description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named vs2019 that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three Windows VS2019 jobs: one with STL and debug build, one without STL and debug build, and one with STL, debug build, and forced C++03. Each job checks out the repository with submodules, adds msbuild to PATH, builds using cmake and MSBuild, and runs tests.
